region.description: Region where this resource will be [managed](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/general/latest/gr/rande.html#regional-endpoints). Defaults to the Region set in the [provider configuration](https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/aws/latest/docs#aws-configuration-reference).

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the resource. If configured with a provider [`default_tags` configuration block](https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/aws/latest/docs#default_tags-configuration-block) present, tags with matching keys will overwrite those defined at the provider-level.

model_package_group_name.description: The name of the model package group.

region.description: Region where this resource will be [managed](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/general/latest/gr/rande.html#regional-endpoints). Defaults to the Region set in the [provider configuration](https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/aws/latest/docs#aws-configuration-reference).

baseline.description: Baseline configuration used to validate that the data conforms to the specified constraints and statistics. Fields are documented below.

batch_transform_input.description: Input object for the batch transform job. Fields are documented below.

cluster_config.description: Configuration for the cluster resources used to run the processing job. Fields are documented below.

container_arguments.description: List of arguments for the container used to run the monitoring job.

container_entrypoint.description: Entrypoint for the container used to run the monitoring job.

csv.description: CSV dataset used in the monitoring job. Fields are documented below.

data_captured_destination_s3_uri.description: Amazon S3 location being used to capture the data.

dataset_format.description: Dataset format for the batch transform job. Fields are documented below.

enable_inter_container_traffic_encryptio.description: Whether to encrypt all communications between distributed processing jobs.

enable_network_isolation.description: Whether to allow inbound and outbound network calls to and from the containers used for the processing job.

end_time_offset.description: Monitoring jobs subtract this time from the end time.

endpoint_input.description: Endpoint for a monitoring job. Fields are documented below.

endpoint_name.description: Endpoint in customer's account which has enabled `DataCaptureConfig`.

environment.description: Map of environment variables in the Docker container.

exclude_features_attribute.description: Attributes of the input data to exclude from the analysis.

features_attribute.description: Attributes of the input data that are the input features.

header.description: Indicates if the CSV data has a header.

image_uri.description: Container image to be run by the monitoring job.

inference_attribute.description: Attribute of the input data that represents the ground truth label.

instance_count.description: Number of ML compute instances to use in the model monitoring job.

instance_type.description: ML compute instance type for the processing job.

json.description: JSON dataset used in the monitoring job. Fields are documented below.

kms_key_id.description: AWS KMS key that Amazon SageMaker AI uses to encrypt the model artifacts at rest using Amazon S3 server-side encryption.

line.description: Indicates if the file should be read as a JSON object per line.

local_path.description: Local path to the Amazon S3 storage location where Amazon SageMaker AI saves the results of a monitoring job.

monitoring_app_specification.description: Configures the monitoring job to run a specified Docker container image. Fields are documented below.

monitoring_inputs.description: Inputs for the monitoring job. Fields are documented below.

monitoring_job_definition.description: Defines the monitoring job. Fields are documented below.

monitoring_job_definition_name.description: The name of the monitoring job definition to schedule.

monitoring_output_config.description: Outputs from the monitoring job to be uploaded to Amazon S3. Fields are documented below.

monitoring_outputs.description: Monitoring outputs for monitoring jobs. Fields are documented below.

monitoring_resources.description: Identifies the resources, ML compute instances, and ML storage volumes to deploy for a monitoring job. Fields are documented below.

monitoring_schedule_config.description: The configuration object that specifies the monitoring schedule and defines the monitoring job. Fields are documented below.

monitoring_type.description: The type of the monitoring job definition to schedule. Valid values are `DataQuality`, `ModelQuality`, `ModelBias` or `ModelExplainability`

name.description: The name of the monitoring schedule. The name must be unique within an AWS Region within an AWS account. If omitted, Terraform will assign a random, unique name.

network_config.description: Networking options for the monitoring job. Fields are documented below.

post_analytics_processor_source_uri.description: Script that is called after analysis has been performed.

probability_attribute.description: In a classification problem, the attribute that represents the class probability.

probability_threshold_attribute.description: Threshold for the class probability to be evaluated as a positive result.

record_preprocessor_source_uri.description: Script that is called per row prior to running analysis.

region.description: Region where this resource will be [managed](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/general/latest/gr/rande.html#regional-endpoints). Defaults to the Region set in the [provider configuration](https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/aws/latest/docs#aws-configuration-reference).

role_arn.description: ARN of an IAM role that Amazon SageMaker AI can assume to perform tasks on your behalf.

s3_data_distribution_type.description: Whether input data distributed in Amazon S3 is fully replicated or sharded by an S3 key. Valid values: `FullyReplicated`, `ShardedByS3Key`.

s3_input_mode.description: Input mode for transferring data for the monitoring job. Valid values: `Pipe`, `File`.

s3_output.description: Amazon S3 storage location where the results of a monitoring job are saved. Fields are documented below.

s3_upload_mode.description: Whether to upload the results of the monitoring job continuously or after the job completes. Valid values: `Continuous`, `EndOfJob`.

s3_uri.description: URI that identifies the Amazon S3 storage location where Amazon SageMaker AI saves the results of a monitoring job.

schedule_config.description: Configures the monitoring schedule. Fields are documented below.

schedule_expression.description: A cron expression that describes details about the monitoring schedule. For example, and hourly schedule would be `cron(0 * ? * * *)`.

security_group_ids.description: VPC security group IDs.

start_time_offset.description: Monitoring jobs subtract this time from the start time.

stopping_condition.description: How long the monitoring job is allowed to run. Fields are documented below.

tags.description: A mapping of tags to assign to the resource. If configured with a provider [`default_tags` configuration block](https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/aws/latest/docs#default_tags-configuration-block) present, tags with matching keys will overwrite those defined at the provider-level.

volume_kms_key_id.description: AWS KMS key that Amazon SageMaker AI uses to encrypt data on the storage volume attached to the ML compute instance(s) that run the model monitoring job.

volume_size_in_gb.description: size of the ML storage volume, in gigabytes, to provision.

vpc_config.description: VPC that SageMaker jobs, hosted models, and compute resources have access to. Fields are documented below.

additional_code_repositories.description: An array of up to three Git repositories to associate with the notebook instance.

default_code_repository.description: The Git repository associated with the notebook instance as its default code repository. This can be either the name of a Git repository stored as a resource in your account, or the URL of a Git repository in [AWS CodeCommit](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/codecommit/latest/userguide/welcome.html) or in any other Git repository.

direct_internet_access.description: Set to `Disabled` to disable internet access to notebook. Requires `security_groups` and `subnet_id` to be set. Supported values: `Enabled` (Default) or `Disabled`. If set to `Disabled`, the notebook instance will be able to access resources only in your VPC, and will not be able to connect to Amazon SageMaker AI training and endpoint services unless your configure a NAT Gateway in your VPC.

instance_metadata_service_configuration.description: Information on the IMDS configuration of the notebook instance. Conflicts with `instance_metadata_service_configuration`. see details below.

instance_type.description: The name of ML compute instance type.

kms_key_id.description: The AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) key that Amazon SageMaker AI uses to encrypt the model artifacts at rest using Amazon S3 server-side encryption.

lifecycle_config_name.description: The name of a lifecycle configuration to associate with the notebook instance.

minimum_instance_metadata_service_versio.description: Indicates the minimum IMDS version that the notebook instance supports. When passed "1" is passed. This means that both IMDSv1 and IMDSv2 are supported. Valid values are `1` and `2`.

name.description: The name of the notebook instance (must be unique).

platform_identifier.description: The platform identifier of the notebook instance runtime environment. This value can be either `notebook-al1-v1`(deprecated), `notebook-al2-v1`(deprecated), `notebook-al2-v2`(deprecated), `notebook-al2-v3`, or `notebook-al2023-v1`, depending on which version of Amazon Linux you require. Defaults to `notebook-al2-v3`.

region.description: Region where this resource will be [managed](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/general/latest/gr/rande.html#regional-endpoints). Defaults to the Region set in the [provider configuration](https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/aws/latest/docs#aws-configuration-reference).

role_arn.description: The ARN of the IAM role to be used by the notebook instance which allows SageMaker AI to call other services on your behalf.

root_access.description: Whether root access is `Enabled` or `Disabled` for users of the notebook instance. The default value is `Enabled`.

security_groups.description: The associated security groups.

subnet_id.description: The VPC subnet ID.

volume_size.description: The size, in GB, of the ML storage volume to attach to the notebook instance. The default value is 5 GB.

name.description: The name of the lifecycle configuration (must be unique). If omitted, Terraform will assign a random, unique name.

on_create.description: A shell script (base64-encoded) that runs only once when the SageMaker AI Notebook Instance is created.

on_start.description: A shell script (base64-encoded) that runs every time the SageMaker AI Notebook Instance is started including the time it's created.

bucket.description: Name of the S3 bucket.

max_parallel_execution_steps.description: The max number of steps that can be executed in parallel.

object_key.description: The object key (or key name) uniquely identifies the object in an S3 bucket.

parallelism_configuration.description: This is the configuration that controls the parallelism of the pipeline. If specified, it applies to all runs of this pipeline by default. see [Parallelism Configuration](#parallelism-configuration) details below.

key.description: The key that identifies a provisioning parameter.

space_settings.description: A collection of space settings. See [`space_settings` Block](#space_settings-block) below.

space_settings.code_editor_app_settings.description: The Code Editor application settings. See [`code_editor_app_settings` Block](#code_editor_app_settings-block) below.

space_settings.custom_file_system.description: A file system, created by you, that you assign to a space for an Amazon SageMaker AI Domain. See [`custom_file_system` Block](#custom_file_system-block) below.

space_settings.jupyter_lab_app_settings.description: The settings for the JupyterLab application. See [`jupyter_lab_app_settings` Block](#jupyter_lab_app_settings-block) below.

space_settings.kernel_gateway_app_settin.description: The kernel gateway app settings. See [`kernel_gateway_app_settings` Block](#kernel_gateway_app_settings-block) below.

space_settings.space_storage_settings.description: The storage settings. See [`space_storage_settings` Block](#space_storage_settings-block) below.

space_sharing_settings.description: A collection of space sharing settings. Required if `ownership_settings` is set. See [`space_sharing_settings` Block](#space_sharing_settings-block) below.
